About

Designing for
high-stakes
moments.

Product Designer and founder. MSc Biomedical Sciences, University of Helsinki. Clinical compliance at Beckton Dickinson. Then a deliberate pivot into design.

I work at the intersection of AI capability and human trust. The best AI design is invisible — helpful, never scary, always leaving the human in control.

3+
Years shipping AI
4
Live products
27K
Brand built from zero
MSc
Biomedical Sciences
Beyond product design

I am also a traditional
Indian artist.

Before product design, there was paint. I specialise in Madhubani and Pattachitra — two of India's oldest folk art traditions, rooted in Kerala and Bihar. My work was featured by Landmark Artist in 2021.

This is not separate from my design practice — it is the foundation of it. Traditional Indian art is built on systems, grids, symbolism, and storytelling — the same principles that make great UX. The lotus motif is a visual hierarchy. The arch is a container component. The three figures are a user flow.

Madhubani Pattachitra Kerala Heritage Featured · Landmark Artist 2021
Radha Krishna — Lotus Garden · Acrylic on canvas · Featured by Landmark Artist, January 2021 · 112 likes
Why this matters for my design work
Traditional Indian art taught me that every visual element earns its place. Nothing is decorative without also being structural. That discipline lives in every product I design.
